title: Contract Project Manager – Marine Engineering
description_raw:
Brunel is supporting a major ship repair and conversion yard in Southampton who need a Project Manager on a day-rate contract to oversee the refit of a specialist offshore support vessel (OSV).

The scope of refit work includes replacement of main propulsion machinery (diesel generators, reduction gearboxes, shaft lines), overhaul of the dynamic positioning (DP) control system mechanical interfaces, and renewal of fire and safety systems throughout the vessel.

Key responsibilities:
- Manage the refit programme on behalf of the vessel owner, acting as the owner’s representative throughout the drydock period and wet commissioning
- Coordinate with the classification society (Lloyd’s Register) on plan approval and condition surveys
- Drive commercial and contractual management of the ship repair yard and subcontractors
- Oversee successful sea trials and crew familiarisation

The client is offering a day rate in the region of six hundred and fifty pounds per day. The assignment will be conducted outside of IR35 and is expected to last approximately seven months, commencing in mid-September 2026.

Background sought:
- HND/HNC or Degree in Marine, Mechanical, or Naval Architecture engineering
- Experience managing ship repair, conversion, or newbuild PM
- Class Society surveyor liaison experience (LR, DNV, BV)
- PRINCE2 / APM PFQ beneficial
